dailyquotes.name: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
dailyquotes.author: Steve Jobs

dailyquotes.name: There are only two ways to live your life. One is as though nothing is a miracle. The other is as though everything is a miracle.
dailyquotes.author: Albert Einstein

dailyquotes.name: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
dailyquotes.author: Winston Churchill

dailyquotes.name: Far and away the best prize that life has to offer is the chance to work hard at work worth doing.
dailyquotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

dailyquotes.name: It is not the critic who counts; not the man who points out how the strong man stumbles... The credit belongs to the man who is actually in the arena.
dailyquotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

dailyquotes.name: It always seems impossible until it’s done.
dailyquotes.author: Nelson Mandela

dailyquotes.name: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
dailyquotes.author: William James

dailyquotes.name: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you have imagined.
dailyquotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

dailyquotes.name: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
dailyquotes.author: Chris Grosser

dailyquotes.name: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
dailyquotes.author: Sam Levenson

dailyquotes.name: Everything you’ve ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
dailyquotes.author: George Addair

dailyquotes.name: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
dailyquotes.author: C.S. Lewis

dailyquotes.name: Dream big and dare to fail.
dailyquotes.author: Norman Vaughan

dailyquotes.name: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
dailyquotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

dailyquotes.name: The future depends on what you do today.
dailyquotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

dailyquotes.name: If you want to achieve greatness stop asking for permission.
dailyquotes.author: Anonymous

dailyquotes.name: The only way we will survive is by being kind.
dailyquotes.author: Amy Poehler

dailyquotes.name: You may encounter many defeats, but you must not be defeated.
dailyquotes.author: Maya Angelou

dailyquotes.name: Try to be a rainbow in someone else’s cloud.
dailyquotes.author: Maya Angelou

dailyquotes.name: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
dailyquotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

dailyquotes.name: What we think, we become.
dailyquotes.author: Buddha

dailyquotes.name: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
dailyquotes.author: Aristotle

dailyquotes.name: In three words I can sum up everything I’ve learned about life: it goes on.
dailyquotes.author: Robert Frost

dailyquotes.name: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
dailyquotes.author: Walt Whitman

dailyquotes.name: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
dailyquotes.author: Dalai Lama

dailyquotes.name: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
dailyquotes.author: John Lennon

dailyquotes.name: Get busy living or get busy dying.
dailyquotes.author: Stephen King

dailyquotes.name: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
dailyquotes.author: Mae West

dailyquotes.name: Many of life’s failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success.
dailyquotes.author: Thomas Edison

dailyquotes.name: Do one thing every day that scares you.
dailyquotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

dailyquotes.name: Whether you think you can, or you think you can't--you're right.
dailyquotes.author: Henry Ford

dailyquotes.name: The world breaks everyone and afterward many are strong at the broken places.
dailyquotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

dailyquotes.name: The best revenge is massive success.
dailyquotes.author: Frank Sinatra

dailyquotes.name: Whenever you find yourself on the side of the majority, it is time to reform (or pause and reflect).
dailyquotes.author: Mark Twain

dailyquotes.name: Curiosity about life in all of its aspects is still the secret of great creative people.
dailyquotes.author: Leo Burnett

dailyquotes.name: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
dailyquotes.author: Confucius

dailyquotes.name: May you live all the days of your life.
dailyquotes.author: Jonathan Swift

dailyquotes.name: Life itself is the most wonderful fairy tale.
dailyquotes.author: Hans Christian Andersen

dailyquotes.name: Don’t let making a living prevent you from making a life.
dailyquotes.author: John Wooden

dailyquotes.name: Life is ours to be spent, not to be saved.
dailyquotes.author: D.H. Lawrence

dailyquotes.name: Keep smiling, because life is a beautiful thing.
dailyquotes.author: Marilyn Monroe

dailyquotes.name: Health is the greatest gift, contentment the greatest wealth.
dailyquotes.author: Buddha

dailyquotes.name: The unexamined life is not worth living.
dailyquotes.author: Socrates

dailyquotes.name: The more you praise and celebrate your life, the more there is in life to celebrate.
dailyquotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

dailyquotes.name: The way I see it, if you want the rainbow, you gotta put up with the rain.
dailyquotes.author: Dolly Parton

dailyquotes.name: Do all the good you can, by all the means you can, in all the ways you can.
dailyquotes.author: John Wesley

dailyquotes.name: Don’t settle for what life gives you; make life better and build something.
dailyquotes.author: Ashton Kutcher

dailyquotes.name: I believe that opportunity looks a lot like hard work.
dailyquotes.author: Ashton Kutcher

dailyquotes.name: You must be the change you wish to see in the world.
dailyquotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

dailyquotes.name: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
dailyquotes.author: Steve Jobs

dailyquotes.name: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
dailyquotes.author: Lao Tzu

dailyquotes.name: That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
dailyquotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

dailyquotes.name: The only way to have a friend is to be one.
dailyquotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

dailyquotes.name: We accept the love we think we deserve.
dailyquotes.author: Stephen Chbosky

dailyquotes.name: Without music, life would be a mistake.
dailyquotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

dailyquotes.name: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
dailyquotes.author: Oscar Wilde

dailyquotes.name: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
dailyquotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

dailyquotes.name: The best way out is always through.
dailyquotes.author: Robert Frost

dailyquotes.name: If you tell the truth, you don't have to remember anything.
dailyquotes.author: Mark Twain

dailyquotes.name: A friend is someone who knows all about you and still loves you.
dailyquotes.author: Elbert Hubbard

dailyquotes.name: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
dailyquotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

dailyquotes.name: Imperfection is beauty, madness is genius and it's better to be absolutely ridiculous than absolutely boring.
dailyquotes.author: Marilyn Monroe

dailyquotes.name: It is better to be hated for what you are than to be loved for something you are not.
dailyquotes.author: Andre Gide

dailyquotes.name: We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
dailyquotes.author: Oscar Wilde

dailyquotes.name: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
dailyquotes.author: Socrates

dailyquotes.name: Be kind whenever possible. It is always possible.
dailyquotes.author: Dalai Lama

dailyquotes.name: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
dailyquotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

dailyquotes.name: Do what you feel in your heart to be right – for you’ll be criticized anyway.
dailyquotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

dailyquotes.name: Every child is an artist. The problem is how to remain an artist once he grows up.
dailyquotes.author: Pablo Picasso

dailyquotes.name: I'm a success today because I had a friend who believed in me and I didn't have the heart to let him down.
dailyquotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

dailyquotes.name: The big lesson in life, baby, is never be scared of anyone or anything.
dailyquotes.author: Frank Sinatra
